title: Internal fault/error if an enum object is referenced in a top module and a module is instantiated using a parameter

features.name: enum type defined in parameterized module
features.description: Code should include an enum type defined inside a module that has a parameter

features.name: hierarchical enum value reference in comparison
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical enum value reference used in a comparison expression

features.name: module instantiation with int unsigned parameter
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where the parameter type is int unsigned
